name: fulcrum
description: AI-centric inventory management and marketplace management.

scripts.test:backend:db: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.test.yml up -d --build && docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.test.yml exec backend alembic upgrade head && docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.test.yml exec backend python -m pytest -m 'db' && docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.test.yml down
scripts.test:all: npm run test:frontend && npm run test:backend:unit && npm run test:backend:db
